signals.headline: SEC and CFTC Joint Guidance Classifies XRP, Solana, Ethereum as Digital Commodities | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC and CFTC Joint Guidance Classifies XRP, Solana, Ethereum as Digital Commodities | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC and CFTC released joint guidance on March 17, 2026, explicitly naming 16 tokens—including **XRP**, **Solana (SOL)**, and **Ethereum (ETH)**—as **digital commodities**, resolving years of legal uncertainty and favoring holders of these assets.[5]

signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal as Trump Signals Iran Negotiations 'Very Close' | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal as Trump Signals Iran Negotiations 'Very Close' | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][5]

A two-week ceasefire between the US, Israel, and Iran was agreed on Wednesday (April 8, 2026), averting wider war and easing the historic oil supply shock via the Strait of Hormuz, with the Kremlin explicitly welcoming it and urging diplomacy over escalation [1]. Preside

signals.headline: UK FCA CP 26/13** confirms crypto exchanges, custody, staking, and stablecoins enter regulated finance by September 2026
signals.raw:
UK FCA CP 26/13** confirms crypto exchanges, custody, staking, and stablecoins enter regulated finance by September 2026, boosting institutional adoption.[1]  
These confirmations could shift **prediction markets** toward bullish outcomes on regulatory clarity, ETF inflows, and altcoin rallies, though ETF flows remain mixed (e.g., Solana/XRP saw net outflows early April).[3]
